rationale.regulatory-compliance: Framework quantifies AML, KYC, and ECOA compliance risks in banking AI.
rationale.risk-ip: PRS metric explicitly measures plagiarism risk and IP violations.
rationale.risk-bias: BPI metric measures bias propagation in generated code comments.
rationale.risk-quality: EG metric measures code comprehensibility and lack of understandable rationale.
rationale.risk-overreliance: ADS metric measures over-reliance on AI without manual modification.
